items.title: Waymo's monthly membership seems like a bad deal
items.summary: Waymo will happily relieve you of $30 a month in exchange for not a whole lot.

items.title: Meta’s Edits app is getting an AI assistant and a desktop version
items.summary: By integrating an AI assistant directly into Edits, Meta is aiming to keep creators engaged on Instagram as it continues to compete with TikTok and YouTube for creators' attention.
